summary: Independent QA accepts M4-TASK-GRAPH-001. The review verified that M3-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 is CLOSED on origin/main, docs/GATE-M3.md records M3_GATE = PASS, current milestone is M4, unique active lead state is preserved, and the actual chore/m4-task-graph worktree contains only planning/status/message changes. The M4 DAG contains 13 task files, 27 M4 dependency edges, no cycles, M4-TASK-GRAPH-001 in REVIEW, and all 12 downstream M4 implementation/validation tasks in DRAFT. The graph covers the required M4 campaign/logistics/siege/AI/UI/determinism/stress/exit scope and explicitly preserves exclusions for manual node battle, complex naval warfare, full diplomacy, 3D battle, multiplayer/server, telemetry, arbitrary-code mods, and frozen-decision Human Gates.

decisions: The task graph is dependency-ordered and acyclic: 13 M4 task files and 27 M4 dependency edges.
M4-TASK-GRAPH-001 is REVIEW and all downstream M4 implementation/validation tasks remain DRAFT, so no M4 implementation has started.

The graph is bounded to Roadmap M4 and covers campaign objectives, muster/prep, mobilized commitments, grain supply, route/transport capacity, march execution, supply state, reinforcement timing, automatic engagement, siege choices, withdrawal, postwar handoff to M3 governance, minimal campaign AI, campaign planning UI, determinism/replay, stress validation, and M4 exit validation.

Manual node battle, complex naval warfare, full diplomacy, 3D battle, multiplayer/server, telemetry, arbitrary-code mods, and frozen product/architecture decisions remain excluded and Human-Gated where applicable.
No product code, package code, content-source data, roadmap, accepted ADR, prior gate document, dependency, or implementation file drift was found.
risks: The downstream implementation tasks are mostly R3 because they will touch deterministic authoritative simulation, protocol payloads, route/supply accounting, automatic resolution, save/replay boundaries, or client command/read-model surfaces.
M4 route and river transport must remain a simple capacity model over accepted M2 scaffolds; complex naval warfare remains out of scope.
M4 AI must remain minimal, deterministic, and explanatory; a hidden general grand-strategy AI would exceed the accepted graph.
M4 stress validation will be milestone evidence only, not final M5 player-study or final H-004 proof.
requested_action: Lead should integrate this QA ACCEPT handoff, run normal integration gates, and only then mark M4-TASK-GRAPH-001 accepted/closed or advance the first dependency-ready M4 implementation task.
